title: 梨梨
content_json: [{"key":"0.27463270207325056","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1158/h_574/50364/103682/2024/9/24/813053.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_973/h_721/50364/103682/2024/9/24/765847.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.37b6bed37cbd7","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者梨梨，身份编码S09-031413，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"DOKI娱乐的知名魔术师，娜菲忒的「女儿」之一。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性格软弱，很容易局促不安。非常恐惧聚光灯和热闹的人群。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在她的演出助理和生活管家，魔术礼帽「拉比翁」和魔术披风「皮特翁」的帮助和监督下，努力克服内心的恐惧登台演出。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"每次演出都会努力排练千百遍，可一旦发生了超出排练情形的意外状况，还是会手忙脚乱而出。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"好在有「拉比翁」与「皮特翁」的及时救场，这些意外的演出事故就变成了表演效果。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"久而久之，这反而成为了一种独有的「表演风格」，为观众们带来了意想不到的惊喜。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"另外，尽管人气很高，但魔术师本人并没有成为「明星」的自觉，总认为一切都是「拉比翁」和「皮特翁」的功劳。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SSR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"破序"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/157597/2024/3/26/522073.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"Doki娱乐"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"幽灵戏法"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"未公开"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"S09-031413"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13653ada819cf","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"ReA芯片状态"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"正常"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":130,"height":212},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_313/h_521/50364/103682/20 :"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/758801.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我……总是不行。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当梨梨推开准备室的门时，她的内心依然志忘不安。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「话说，为什么我觉得自己一直在上下晃动啊？」一个闷闷的声音从梨梨背后响起，是魔术披风「皮特翁」问道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「可能是有人怕得发抖吧，嘿嘿。」魔术礼帽「拉比翁」回答。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"没错，此刻的梨梨将要登台表演，虽然要表演的项目已经排演过上百遍，可她仍止不住害怕。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对不起····我…····我太没用了，如果不是拉比翁先生和皮特翁先生·····根本就·····根本就不会有人来看我的演出……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「梨梨」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「到！」还未等拉比翁说完，梨梨就条件反射般回答。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「梨梨，听我说。」拉比翁耐心地说，「你要告诉自己『放轻松…·····放轻松…··』，而不是一直紧绷绷地，好像下一秒就要遭受袭击了一样。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉比翁话音刚落，准备室通往舞台的门就打开了。梨梨站在门口，不前，两手握拳举在身前，似乎在为自己打气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「梨梨你放心，万事都有我们给你帮忙呢，你只要做完该做的就好！」拉比翁和皮特翁一起低语，试图让眼前的小女孩打起精神。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"可梨梨脸色惨白，看起来随时都会晕过去。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我……要鼓起勇气！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"演出虽然结束了，但终究还是闹出了不小的乱子。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因为紧张原本只需要变出一只鸽子的梨梨，却一不小心变出了一群鸽子，把整个会场弄得一团糟。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"多亏会馆里的人帮忙，才把那些鸽子全部收了回去……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"到了第二场，梨梨却死活不愿意再上场。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「果然我还是不行！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不行不行不行！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我再也不要去了，再也不要去了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨抱着旁边的柱子拼命地摇头，任凭旁边的拉比翁怎么劝说，都丝毫鼓不起勇气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我受不了了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「笨蛋！笨蛋！笨蛋！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"生气的皮特翁跳了起来，给了梨梨一个头槌。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「疼！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨喊着疼，然后一屁股坐在了地上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「笨蛋！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"皮特翁骂着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我再也不想理你了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"骂完之后，皮特翁再也没有了声音。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"显然，它这次真的生气了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨捡起来落在地上的帽子，然后看着旁边叹气的拉比翁。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「拉比翁先生……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「梨梨，你还记得奥利维尔先生吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我当然记得！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨眼睛里突然流露出激动的神采。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那可是世界上最棒的魔术表演。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那你还记得，在那个舞台上，奥利维尔先生说过什么吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉比翁看着梨梨。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥利维尔先生说，成功的魔术，只有一条原则，那就是观众的笑声。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而伟大的魔术师，一定能给人带来快乐，带来幸福。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨很流利地说背出了奥利维尔的原话。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那么，舞台，对于魔术师来说，又是什么？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥利维尔先生说过——无论发生什么，魔术师从不背叛属于自己的舞台。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨的声音突然弱了下来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——无论发生什么，魔术师从不背叛属于自己的舞台。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——因为他的一切，都为舞台而生！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那在特洛庇尔剧院穹顶回荡的声音，仿佛又回到了梨梨的耳畔。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「拉比翁先生，我知道要怎么做了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨深吸了口气，然后抱着自己的帽子站了起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉比翁点了点头，然后轻轻地落回了梨梨的肩上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥利维尔先生！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我会鼓起勇气的！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我……做到了！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「接下来我们将要看到的，是DOKI娱乐当之无愧的『魔术新星』———梨梨小姐！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在掌声与欢呼声的簇拥下，梨梨摇晃着上了台。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"魔术表演开始了，梨梨先是做了几个基础的戏法，又应观众请求打算变出两只白鸽，不知怎的，她手一滑，一群鸽子就这样飞了出来，引得现场一片哗然。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但很快，就引起了一阵阵笑声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「他们笑了！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你做得很好，梨梨！别害怕！就这样继续下去！」拉比翁压着声音，提醒着梨梨。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「有我们呢！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我……我不紧张！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨颤着手重新摘下自己的魔术礼帽。战战兢兢地进入下一个流程的表演。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这场魔术名为「易位空间」，顾名思义，这需要魔术师本人在相应构筑出的区域里完成一次次「易位」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"起初，梨梨用绳子之类的小型道具顺利完成了表演，接下来，就需要她自己进入空间，完成最为完美的「易位」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"梨梨站在高台中，央，双手摩挲着身后的披风和礼帽。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不紧张不紧张，我不紧张！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥利维尔先生说过，我能做到的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「娜菲忒女士也说过，我能做到的！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还有皮特翁和拉比翁在呢，我肯定可以的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我也要相信我自己！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一边不断鼓励自己，一边深吸了一口气，一咬牙，梨梨自高台跃下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在众人的惊呼声后……梨梨顺利出现在了舞台另一端的花从中，央。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而此时，无数的花瓣化作花雨从整个穹顶落下。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"刚刚因期待而死寂的场内爆发出雷鸣般的掌声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"此时，所有的聚光灯，落在了梨梨的身上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在如潮的掌声和欢呼中，她的眼睛里闪烁着炽热的光。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.c3cbbd5af5031","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉条，增益"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 551|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3生命/防御加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉莉作为游戏的底层逻辑，在pve和pvp都是无敌的存在，我只能用2个字来形容她，有了她，你就是无敌的"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.a046409bfac57","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8戍卫+6讯光天击"}]}]}},{"key":"0.5db2c7154bf41","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼"}]}]}},{"key":"0.ff397e14d02548","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":""}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/64301.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
